targets.query:
SELECT LAST("cn_current") AS "cn_current",
LAST("cn_min") AS "cn_min",
LAST("cn_max") AS "cn_max",
LAST("mra_current") AS "nobel_current",
LAST("mra_min") AS "nobel_min",
LAST("mra_max") AS "nobel_max",
LAST("ph_current") AS "ph_current",
LAST("ph_min") AS "ph_min",
LAST("ph_max") AS "ph_max"
FROM "coagulantTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "ctNo" = 'CT${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND $timeFilter

SELECT "cn_current","cn_min","cn_max"
FROM "coagulantTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "ctNo" = 'CT${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND $timeFilter
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT "mra_current" AS "nobel_current",
       "mra_min" AS "nobel_min",
       "mra_max" AS "nobel_max"
FROM "coagulantTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "ctNo" = 'CT${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND $timeFilter
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT "ph_current","ph_min","ph_max"
FROM "coagulantTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "ctNo" = 'CT${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND $timeFilter
ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT mean("value") FROM "measurement" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT LAST("cn_current") AS "cn_current",
LAST("cn_min") AS "cn_min",
LAST("cn_max") AS "cn_max",
LAST("mra_current") AS "nobel_current",
LAST("mra_min") AS "nobel_min",
LAST("mra_max") AS "nobel_max",
LAST("ph_current") AS "ph_current",
LAST("ph_min") AS "ph_min",
LAST("ph_max") AS "ph_max"
FROM "coagulantTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "ctNo" = 'CT${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "batchNo","cnType","mraType"

SELECT "cn_current","cn_min","cn_max"
FROM "coagulantTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "ctNo" = 'CT${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND $timeFilter
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT "mra_current" AS "nobel_current",  "mra_min" AS "nobel_min",  "mra_max" AS "nobel_max"
FROM "coagulantTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "ctNo" = 'CT${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND $timeFilter
ORDER BY time ASC
